hook: Ambiguity can become addictive when it keeps alternating hope and disappointment.
body: That emotional swing can feel intense enough to masquerade as chemistry even when the bond itself is weak.
voices: Psychology Today, The School of Life

hook: Many men keep returning to the dynamic because the uncertainty is stimulating, not because the fit is actually good.
body: Intensity from inconsistency is not the same thing as depth from mutual connection.
voices: Psychology Today, The School of Life

hook: Intensity from inconsistency is not the same thing as depth from mutual connection.
body: Someone who appears, disappears, and reappears may occupy a lot of mental space without offering much real stability.
voices: Psychology Today, The School of Life

hook: Someone who appears, disappears, and reappears may occupy a lot of mental space without offering much real stability.
body: When the pattern keeps spiking your attention, ask whether it also builds any genuine trust.
